activities_projects.title: Places Mentioned in the Lesson
activities_projects.objective: Identify important places in the prose
steps: Read the lesson carefully
List the places mentioned in Kathmandu
Write one sentence about each place
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Identifies important locations in the text

activities_projects.title: Two Sacred Temples
activities_projects.objective: Understand the main places visited by the author
steps: Find the names of the temples visited
Write 2–3 lines about each temple
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises the main religious places in the lesson

activities_projects.title: Atmosphere of Pashupatinath
activities_projects.objective: Understand the scene at Pashupatinath temple
steps: Read the paragraph describing Pashupatinath
Write four points describing the atmosphere there

activities_projects.title: Baudhnath Stupa Description
activities_projects.objective: Identify features of the Baudhnath shrine
steps: Read the description of Baudhnath
Write 3–4 lines explaining its peaceful atmosphere

activities_projects.title: Street Life of Kathmandu
activities_projects.objective: Observe the busy street scene described
steps: List the things the author sees in the streets
Write them in short points
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Identifies visual imagery in the lesson

activities_projects.title: Flute Seller
activities_projects.objective: Understand the character of the flute seller
steps: Read the paragraph about the flute seller
Write 4 lines describing his behaviour

activities_projects.title: Sounds in Kathmandu
activities_projects.objective: Identify different sounds mentioned in the lesson
steps: Find examples of sounds described
Write at least five examples

activities_projects.title: Things the Author Buys
steps: Identify what the author buys in the market
List them in your notebook

activities_projects.title: Meaning of the Title
activities_projects.objective: Understand the theme of the lesson
steps: Think about the description of Kathmandu
Write 3–4 lines explaining why the title suits the lesson

activities_projects.title: Travel Experience
activities_projects.objective: Connect the lesson with personal experience
steps: Think about a place you visited
Write 4–5 lines describing your experience
